summary: Python-backed disk scanning with live verbose logs, plus deferred daily update checks.
introduced: Bundled Python scanner for Phase 1 volume indexing with JSON progress streaming into the existing UI
Scanner log panel on the dashboard with an Open in Terminal action to tail verbose scan output
changed: Version update checks run at most once per day while the main window is open and the app is in the foreground — not at startup or when only the menu bar is active
fixed: Startup prompts for Python 3.8+ when the bundled scanner is enabled but no compatible interpreter is installed
